have h (z : D^) : ∃ (N : ℕ+) (z' : 𝓞^), (N : ℤ) • z = j₂ z' := by

    | zero => use 1, 0; simp
    | tmul d h =>

      | zero => use 1, 0; simp
      | tmul q ω =>
        use ⟨q.den, q.den_pos⟩, q.num • (ω ⊗ₜ h)
        dsimp [j₂]
        simp only [AlgHom.coe_comp, AlgEquiv.toAlgHom_coe, Function.comp_apply,
          Algebra.TensorProduct.includeRight_apply, map_smul,
          Algebra.TensorProduct.assoc_symm_tmul, ← TensorProduct.smul_tmul]
        rw [Rat.coe_int_den, Rat.smul_def, Rat.mul_den_eq_num]
        rfl
      | add d1 d2 ih1 ih2 =>
        obtain ⟨N1, ω1, h1⟩ := ih1; obtain ⟨N2, ω2, h2⟩ := ih2
        use N1 * N2, (N2 : ℤ) • ω1 + (N1 : ℤ) • ω2
        simp only [smul_add, ← h1, ← h2, smul_smul, PNat.coe_mul, Int.cast_mul, mul_comm]
    | add z1 z2 ih1 ih2 =>
      obtain ⟨N1, z1', h1⟩ := ih1; obtain ⟨N2, z2', h2⟩ := ih2
      use N1 * N2, (N2 : ℤ) • z1' + (N1 : ℤ) • z2'
      simp only [smul_add, ← h1, ← h2, smul_smul, PNat.coe_mul, Int.cast_mul, mul_comm]
  obtain ⟨N, z', hz⟩ := h z; use N, z'
  have : j₁ ((N⁻¹ : ℚ) ⊗ₜ 1) * j₂ z' = (N⁻¹ : ℚ) • j₂ z' := by
    induction z' using TensorProduct.induction_on with
    | zero => simp
    | tmul ω h =>
      dsimp [j₁, j₂]
      simp only [Algebra.TensorProduct.includeLeft_apply, Algebra.TensorProduct.includeRight_apply,
        AlgHom.coe_comp, AlgEquiv.toAlgHom_coe, Function.comp_apply, Algebra.TensorProduct.assoc_symm_tmul,
        Algebra.TensorProduct.tmul_mul_tmul, mul_one, one_mul, ← TensorProduct.smul_tmul, smul_eq_mul]
    | add z1 z2 ih1 ih2 => simp [mul_add, smul_add, ih1, ih2]
